examples.en: Implicit feedback signals such as clicks and dwell time are noisier but more abundant than explicit ratings.
examples.zh: 点击和停留时间等隐式反馈信号比显式评分更嘈杂但更丰富。

examples.en: Treating implicit feedback as binary positive/unlabeled data requires careful negative sampling strategies.
examples.zh: 将隐式反馈视为二元正/未标记数据需要仔细的负采样策略。

examples.en: The absence of implicit feedback does not necessarily mean disinterest—the item may simply not have been exposed.
examples.zh: 隐式反馈的缺失不一定意味着不感兴趣——物品可能只是没有被曝光。

examples.en: Longer dwell time on an article is treated as a positive implicit signal of user interest.
examples.zh: 在文章上更长的停留时间被视为用户兴趣的正面隐式信号。

examples.en: Short dwell time combined with a click may indicate clickbait rather than genuine user satisfaction.
examples.zh: 短停留时间加上点击可能表示标题党而非真正的用户满意。

examples.en: Modeling dwell time as a continuous reward provides richer supervision than binary click labels.
examples.zh: 将停留时间建模为连续奖励比二元点击标签提供更丰富的监督。

examples.en: Recommendation diversity ensures users are exposed to a broad range of content categories.
examples.zh: 推荐多样性确保用户接触到广泛的内容类别。

examples.en: Maximal marginal relevance (MMR) balances relevance with diversity by penalizing redundant items.
examples.zh: 最大边际相关性(MMR)通过惩罚冗余物品来平衡相关性和多样性。

examples.en: Intra-list diversity measures the dissimilarity between items within a single recommendation list.
examples.zh: 列表内多样性衡量单个推荐列表中物品之间的差异性。

examples.en: Serendipitous recommendations introduce unexpected but delightful content that broadens user horizons.
examples.zh: 惊喜推荐引入意想不到但令人愉悦的内容，拓宽用户视野。

examples.en: Serendipity metrics measure how surprising and relevant the recommendations are to the user.
examples.zh: 惊喜度指标衡量推荐对用户来说有多么出乎意料和相关。

examples.en: Optimizing purely for relevance reduces serendipity and leads to predictable, monotonous recommendations.
examples.zh: 纯粹优化相关性会降低惊喜度并导致可预测的、单调的推荐。

examples.en: Filter bubbles arise when recommendation algorithms over-personalize and limit information diversity.
examples.zh: 当推荐算法过度个性化并限制信息多样性时，就会产生过滤气泡。

examples.en: Breaking filter bubbles requires explicitly injecting diverse and opposing viewpoints into recommendations.
examples.zh: 打破过滤气泡需要在推荐中明确注入多样化和对立的观点。

examples.en: Research shows that filter bubbles can reinforce existing beliefs and reduce exposure to new perspectives.
examples.zh: 研究表明过滤气泡可以强化现有信念并减少对新观点的接触。

examples.en: The exploration-exploitation tradeoff balances showing known-good items versus discovering new preferences.
examples.zh: 探索-利用权衡在展示已知好的物品与发现新偏好之间取得平衡。

examples.en: Epsilon-greedy exploration randomly shows non-optimal items with a small probability to collect diverse feedback.
examples.zh: Epsilon贪心探索以小概率随机展示非最优物品以收集多样化反馈。

examples.en: Thompson sampling naturally balances exploration and exploitation using posterior probability distributions.
examples.zh: Thompson采样使用后验概率分布自然地平衡探索和利用。

chinese: 赌博机算法（多臂老虎机）

examples.en: Contextual bandit algorithms adaptively select the best content variant for each user in real time.
examples.zh: 上下文赌博机算法实时自适应地为每个用户选择最佳内容变体。

examples.en: Multi-armed bandits model the problem of choosing between k actions with uncertain rewards.
examples.zh: 多臂赌博机模型化了在k个具有不确定奖励的动作之间选择的问题。

examples.en: LinUCB is a contextual bandit algorithm that models reward as a linear function of context features.
examples.zh: LinUCB是一种上下文赌博机算法，将奖励建模为上下文特征的线性函数。

examples.en: Position bias causes users to click higher-ranked items regardless of their actual relevance.
examples.zh: 位置偏差导致用户点击排名较高的物品，而不管其实际相关性。

examples.en: Inverse propensity weighting corrects for position bias by reweighting clicks based on examination probability.
examples.zh: 逆倾向性加权通过基于检查概率重新加权点击来校正位置偏差。

examples.en: Position bias is stronger on mobile devices where users tend to examine fewer results.
examples.zh: 位置偏差在移动设备上更强，因为用户倾向于查看更少的结果。

examples.en: Sequential recommendation models the temporal order of user interactions to predict the next item.
examples.zh: 序列推荐模型化用户交互的时间顺序以预测下一个物品。

examples.en: Transformer-based sequential models like SASRec use self-attention to capture long-range interaction patterns.
examples.zh: 基于Transformer的序列模型如SASRec使用自注意力来捕获长距离交互模式。

examples.en: Session-based recommendation focuses on short-term interaction sequences within a single visit.
examples.zh: 基于会话的推荐关注单次访问中的短期交互序列。

examples.en: Exposure bias in recommendation data means that unshown items lack feedback, not that they are irrelevant.
examples.zh: 推荐数据中的曝光偏差意味着未展示的物品缺乏反馈，而不是它们不相关。

examples.en: Exposure bias leads the model to underestimate the quality of items it has never recommended.
examples.zh: 曝光偏差导致模型低估它从未推荐过的物品的质量。

examples.en: Counterfactual reasoning and randomized exposure experiments help correct for exposure bias.
examples.zh: 反事实推理和随机曝光实验有助于校正曝光偏差。

examples.en: User segmentation partitions the customer base into homogeneous groups for targeted marketing.
examples.zh: 用户分群将客户群划分为同质组以进行精准营销。

examples.en: Behavioral segmentation clusters users based on their in-app actions rather than demographic attributes.
examples.zh: 行为分群基于用户的应用内行为而非人口统计属性进行聚类。

examples.en: LLM-powered segmentation uses natural language descriptions to define segments more flexibly.
examples.zh: LLM驱动的分群使用自然语言描述来更灵活地定义用户群。

examples.en: Analyzing the conversion funnel reveals the stages where users drop off most frequently.
examples.zh: 分析转化漏斗揭示了用户最频繁流失的阶段。

examples.en: The purchase funnel tracks user progression from awareness to consideration to conversion.
examples.zh: 购买漏斗跟踪用户从认知到考虑到转化的进展。

examples.en: Funnel analysis identified that 60% of users drop off at the payment step due to UX friction.
examples.zh: 漏斗分析发现60%的用户在支付步骤由于用户体验摩擦而流失。

examples.en: The churn prediction model identifies at-risk customers 30 days before they cancel their subscription.
examples.zh: 流失预测模型在客户取消订阅前30天识别出有风险的客户。

examples.en: Reducing churn by even 5% can increase lifetime revenue by 25-95% depending on the business.
examples.zh: 即使降低5%的流失率也可以使终身收入增加25-95%，具体取决于业务。

examples.en: Proactive churn prevention interventions are triggered when the predicted churn probability exceeds a threshold.
examples.zh: 当预测的流失概率超过阈值时，会触发主动的流失预防干预。

examples.en: Day-7 retention measures the fraction of new users who return to the app after one week.
examples.zh: 7天留存衡量新用户在一周后返回应用的比例。

examples.en: Improving early retention has a compounding effect on long-term user base growth.
examples.zh: 改善早期留存对长期用户基数增长具有复合效应。

examples.en: Retention curves typically follow a power-law decay, stabilizing after a characteristic plateau period.
examples.zh: 留存曲线通常遵循幂律衰减，在特定的平台期后趋于稳定。

examples.en: Predicting customer lifetime value helps optimize acquisition spend and prioritize high-value users.
examples.zh: 预测客户终身价值有助于优化获客支出并优先考虑高价值用户。

examples.en: LTV models estimate the total revenue a customer will generate over their entire relationship with the company.
examples.zh: LTV模型估计客户在与公司的整个关系期间将产生的总收入。

examples.en: Acquisition cost should not exceed predicted lifetime value for a sustainable growth strategy.
examples.zh: 获客成本不应超过预测的终身价值以实现可持续的增长策略。

examples.en: Real-time personalization adapts the website content and product recommendations to each visitor.
examples.zh: 实时个性化根据每位访客调整网站内容和产品推荐。

examples.en: Personalization at scale requires efficient inference systems that serve customized content within milliseconds.
examples.zh: 大规模个性化需要在毫秒内提供定制内容的高效推理系统。

examples.en: Over-personalization risks creating filter bubbles that limit user discovery of new interests.
examples.zh: 过度个性化有创建过滤气泡的风险，限制用户发现新兴趣。

examples.en: Cohort analysis tracks how user behavior metrics evolve over time for groups defined by signup date.
examples.zh: 群组分析跟踪按注册日期定义的用户组行为指标随时间的变化。

examples.en: Comparing retention curves across cohorts reveals whether product changes improve long-term engagement.
examples.zh: 比较不同群组的留存曲线可以揭示产品变更是否改善了长期参与度。

examples.en: Weekly cohort analysis detected a sudden drop in Day-1 retention following the latest app update.
examples.zh: 每周群组分析检测到最新应用更新后第1天留存率的突然下降。

examples.en: Sentiment analysis classifies customer reviews as positive, negative, or neutral to gauge brand perception.
examples.zh: 情感分析将客户评论分类为正面、负面或中性以衡量品牌认知。

examples.en: Aspect-based sentiment analysis identifies sentiment toward specific product features mentioned in reviews.
examples.zh: 基于方面的情感分析识别评论中提到的特定产品功能的情感。

examples.en: LLM-based sentiment analysis achieves near-human accuracy without requiring labeled training data.
examples.zh: 基于LLM的情感分析在不需要标记训练数据的情况下达到接近人类的准确率。

examples.en: Dynamic pricing algorithms adjust product prices in real time based on demand and competitive signals.
examples.zh: 动态定价算法根据需求和竞争信号实时调整产品价格。

examples.en: Reinforcement learning-based dynamic pricing learns optimal pricing strategies through market interaction.
examples.zh: 基于强化学习的动态定价通过市场交互学习最优定价策略。

examples.en: Fairness constraints in dynamic pricing prevent discriminatory prices based on sensitive user attributes.
examples.zh: 动态定价中的公平性约束防止基于敏感用户属性的歧视性价格。

examples.en: Price elasticity estimation determines how demand changes in response to price variations.
examples.zh: 价格弹性估计确定需求如何随价格变化而变化。

examples.en: Products with high price elasticity see large demand changes from small price adjustments.
examples.zh: 具有高价格弹性的产品会因小幅价格调整而看到大的需求变化。

examples.en: Cross-price elasticity measures how the demand for one product changes when a substitute's price changes.
examples.zh: 交叉价格弹性衡量当替代品价格变化时一种产品的需求如何变化。

examples.en: Uplift modeling identifies customers whose behavior would change as a result of the marketing intervention.
examples.zh: 增益模型识别那些行为会因营销干预而改变的客户。

examples.en: Two-model uplift estimation separately predicts outcomes under treatment and control conditions.
examples.zh: 双模型增益估计分别预测处理和控制条件下的结果。

examples.en: Uplift modeling prevents wasting budget on users who would convert anyway or who are unreachable.
examples.zh: 增益模型防止在无论如何都会转化或无法触达的用户上浪费预算。

examples.en: Lookalike audience expansion finds new users who resemble existing high-value customers.
examples.zh: 相似受众扩展寻找与现有高价值客户相似的新用户。

examples.en: The lookalike model uses embedding similarity to identify users with behavior patterns matching the seed set.
examples.zh: 相似受众模型使用嵌入相似性来识别行为模式匹配种子集的用户。

examples.en: Adjusting the lookalike expansion ratio trades off between reach and similarity to the seed audience.
examples.zh: 调整相似受众扩展比例在触达范围和与种子受众的相似性之间权衡。

examples.en: Machine learning credit scoring models outperform traditional scorecards by capturing non-linear feature interactions.
examples.zh: 机器学习信用评分模型通过捕获非线性特征交互超越传统评分卡。

examples.en: Credit scoring assigns a numerical score representing the likelihood that a borrower will repay their debt.
examples.zh: 信用评分分配一个数值分数表示借款人偿还债务的可能性。

examples.en: Regulatory requirements demand that credit scoring models are explainable and free from discriminatory bias.
examples.zh: 监管要求信用评分模型是可解释的且不含歧视性偏差。

examples.en: The model predicts the probability of default within a 12-month observation window.
examples.zh: 该模型预测在12个月观察窗口内的违约概率。

examples.en: A borrower is considered in default when payments are overdue by more than 90 days.
examples.zh: 当还款逾期超过90天时，借款人被视为违约。

examples.en: Macroeconomic variables like unemployment rate are strong predictors of aggregate default rates.
examples.zh: 失业率等宏观经济变量是总体违约率的强预测指标。

examples.en: The probability of default is calibrated using Platt scaling to ensure alignment with observed default rates.
examples.zh: 违约概率使用Platt缩放进行校准，以确保与观察到的违约率一致。

examples.en: PD estimation requires careful handling of class imbalance since defaults are relatively rare events.
examples.zh: PD估计需要仔细处理类别不平衡，因为违约是相对罕见的事件。

examples.en: Through-the-cycle PD estimates remain stable across economic cycles, unlike point-in-time PD.
examples.zh: 跨周期PD估计在经济周期中保持稳定，不像时点PD。

examples.en: Loss given default estimation accounts for collateral recovery and collection costs.
examples.zh: 违约损失率估计考虑了抵押品回收和催收成本。

examples.en: LGD varies significantly across product types, with secured loans having lower LGD than unsecured ones.
examples.zh: LGD在不同产品类型之间差异显著，有担保贷款的LGD低于无担保贷款。

examples.en: Downturn LGD models estimate losses under stressed economic conditions as required by Basel regulations.
examples.zh: 低迷期LGD模型按照巴塞尔法规要求估计压力经济条件下的损失。

examples.en: Automated underwriting systems process loan applications in seconds using machine learning models.
examples.zh: 自动化承保系统使用机器学习模型在几秒钟内处理贷款申请。

examples.en: The underwriting model balances approval rates with portfolio risk to optimize expected returns.
examples.zh: 承保模型平衡批准率和投资组合风险以优化预期回报。

examples.en: Human underwriters review edge cases where the automated system has low confidence.
examples.zh: 人工承保员审查自动化系统置信度低的边缘案例。

examples.en: The logistic regression scorecard assigns points to each feature bin for interpretable credit decisions.
examples.zh: 逻辑回归评分卡为每个特征分箱分配分数以实现可解释的信贷决策。

examples.en: Scorecard models remain popular in banking due to their transparency and regulatory acceptance.
examples.zh: 评分卡模型由于其透明度和监管接受度在银行业中仍然流行。

examples.en: Feature binning in scorecard development transforms continuous variables into discrete risk categories.
examples.zh: 评分卡开发中的特征分箱将连续变量转换为离散风险类别。

examples.en: Graph neural networks capture relational patterns between accounts for improved fraud detection.
examples.zh: 图神经网络捕获账户之间的关系模式以改进欺诈检测。

examples.en: Real-time fraud detection must make decisions within milliseconds while maintaining high accuracy.
examples.zh: 实时欺诈检测必须在毫秒内做出决定同时保持高准确率。

examples.en: Adversarial robustness is critical for fraud detection as fraudsters actively adapt to evade models.
examples.zh: 对抗鲁棒性对欺诈检测至关重要，因为欺诈者会主动适应以逃避模型。

examples.en: Anomaly detection flags unusual transaction patterns that deviate significantly from the user's baseline behavior.
examples.zh: 异常检测标记与用户基线行为显著偏离的异常交易模式。

examples.en: Autoencoder-based anomaly detection identifies outliers by measuring reconstruction error.
examples.zh: 基于自编码器的异常检测通过测量重建误差来识别异常值。

examples.en: Isolation forests efficiently detect anomalies by measuring how easily a point can be isolated from the rest.
examples.zh: 隔离森林通过衡量一个点可以多容易地从其余数据中隔离来高效检测异常。

examples.en: Graph-based anti-money laundering systems detect suspicious fund flow networks across multiple accounts.
examples.zh: 基于图的反洗钱系统检测跨多个账户的可疑资金流网络。

examples.en: AML models must balance detection sensitivity with operational capacity to investigate flagged alerts.
examples.zh: AML模型必须在检测灵敏度和调查标记警报的运营能力之间取得平衡。

examples.en: Deep learning reduces false positive rates in AML alert systems, saving significant investigation resources.
examples.zh: 深度学习降低了AML警报系统中的假阳性率，节省了大量调查资源。

examples.en: Regulatory requirements demand high interpretability for models used in consumer lending decisions.
examples.zh: 监管要求在消费贷款决策中使用的模型具有高可解释性。

examples.en: LIME provides local interpretability by approximating complex models with simple linear explanations.
examples.zh: LIME通过用简单的线性解释近似复杂模型来提供局部可解释性。

examples.en: There is often a tradeoff between model accuracy and interpretability that practitioners must navigate.
examples.zh: 模型准确性和可解释性之间通常存在从业者必须权衡的取舍。

examples.en: SHAP values provide local explainability by attributing each prediction to individual feature contributions.
examples.zh: SHAP值通过将每个预测归因于单个特征贡献来提供局部可解释性。

examples.en: Post-hoc explainability methods analyze a trained model without modifying its architecture.
examples.zh: 事后可解释性方法在不修改模型架构的情况下分析已训练的模型。

examples.en: Counterfactual explanations tell users what input changes would lead to a different model decision.
examples.zh: 反事实解释告诉用户什么样的输入变化会导致不同的模型决策。

examples.en: Adverse action notices must specify the top reasons for credit denial as required by fair lending regulations.
examples.zh: 不利决定通知必须按照公平贷款法规的要求说明信贷拒绝的主要原因。

examples.en: Generating accurate adverse action reasons from complex ML models is a key regulatory compliance challenge.
examples.zh: 从复杂的ML模型生成准确的不利决定原因是一个关键的监管合规挑战。

examples.en: SHAP-based reason code generation automates the adverse action explanation process for ML-based decisions.
examples.zh: 基于SHAP的原因代码生成自动化了基于ML决策的不利决定解释过程。

examples.en: Permutation feature importance reveals which variables contribute most to the model's predictive power.
examples.zh: 置换特征重要性揭示了哪些变量对模型的预测能力贡献最大。

examples.en: Global feature importance provides an overview of which features matter most across all predictions.
examples.zh: 全局特征重要性提供了哪些特征在所有预测中最重要的概述。

examples.en: Tree-based models compute feature importance from the total reduction in impurity across all splits.
examples.zh: 基于树的模型从所有分裂的总不纯度减少中计算特征重要性。

examples.en: Time series forecasting models predict future asset prices and trading volumes from historical patterns.
examples.zh: 时间序列预测模型从历史模式预测未来的资产价格和交易量。

examples.en: Transformer-based time series models capture long-range temporal dependencies more effectively than RNNs.
examples.zh: 基于Transformer的时间序列模型比RNN更有效地捕获长距离时间依赖关系。

examples.en: Seasonal decomposition separates time series into trend, seasonal, and residual components.
examples.zh: 季节性分解将时间序列分离为趋势、季节性和残差成分。

examples.en: Implied volatility surfaces are modeled using neural networks to price exotic options accurately.
examples.zh: 隐含波动率曲面使用神经网络建模以准确地为奇异期权定价。

examples.en: GARCH models capture the time-varying volatility clustering observed in financial return series.
examples.zh: GARCH模型捕获在金融收益率序列中观察到的时变波动性聚类。

examples.en: Realized volatility computed from high-frequency data provides a more accurate measure than daily returns.
examples.zh: 从高频数据计算的已实现波动性提供了比日收益率更准确的度量。

examples.en: Portfolio optimization uses reinforcement learning to dynamically allocate assets across market conditions.
examples.zh: 投资组合优化使用强化学习在不同市场条件下动态分配资产。

examples.en: Mean-variance portfolio optimization balances expected returns against portfolio risk.
examples.zh: 均值-方差投资组合优化在预期收益和组合风险之间取得平衡。

examples.en: Deep portfolio management uses neural networks to learn non-linear asset allocation strategies.
examples.zh: 深度投资组合管理使用神经网络学习非线性资产配置策略。

examples.en: Risk stratification segments borrowers into tiers to apply differentiated pricing and credit limits.
examples.zh: 风险分层将借款人分为不同层级以应用差异化定价和信用额度。

examples.en: Fine-grained risk stratification enables more precise pricing that reflects each borrower's true risk.
examples.zh: 细粒度的风险分层使更精确的定价成为可能，反映每个借款人的真实风险。

examples.en: The risk stratification table shows default rates increasing monotonically across score deciles.
examples.zh: 风险分层表显示违约率在分数十分位数间单调增加。

examples.en: Early delinquency models predict the likelihood of a borrower missing payments within the first 90 days.
examples.zh: 早期逾期模型预测借款人在前90天内错过付款的可能性。

examples.en: Delinquency rates are a leading indicator of portfolio credit quality deterioration.
examples.zh: 逾期率是投资组合信用质量恶化的先行指标。

examples.en: Roll-rate analysis tracks how delinquent accounts transition between different stages of past-due status.
examples.zh: 滚动率分析跟踪逾期账户在不同逾期阶段之间的转换。

examples.en: Vintage analysis tracks default rates over time for loans originated in each monthly cohort.
examples.zh: 账龄分析跟踪每月队列中发放的贷款随时间推移的违约率。

examples.en: Comparing vintage curves reveals whether credit policy changes have improved portfolio performance.
examples.zh: 比较账龄曲线可以揭示信贷政策变化是否改善了投资组合表现。

examples.en: The latest vintage shows significantly lower early delinquency rates after the scorecard model update.
examples.zh: 在评分卡模型更新后，最新的账龄显示早期逾期率显著降低。

examples.en: Model drift monitoring detects when the relationship between features and outcomes changes over time.
examples.zh: 模型漂移监控检测特征和结果之间的关系何时随时间变化。

examples.en: Population stability index (PSI) measures distribution shift between training and production data.
examples.zh: 群体稳定性指数(PSI)衡量训练数据和生产数据之间的分布偏移。

examples.en: COVID-19 caused severe model drift as consumer behavior patterns shifted dramatically and suddenly.
examples.zh: COVID-19导致严重的模型漂移，因为消费者行为模式发生了剧烈和突然的变化。

examples.en: Ablation studies systematically remove components to quantify the contribution of each module.
examples.zh: 消融实验系统地移除组件以量化每个模块的贡献。

examples.en: The ablation results show that removing the attention mechanism leads to a 5% drop in accuracy.
examples.zh: 消融结果显示移除注意力机制导致准确率下降5%。

examples.en: We conduct ablation over data augmentation strategies to identify the most impactful techniques.
examples.zh: 我们对数据增强策略进行消融以识别最具影响力的技术。

examples.en: Our empirical results demonstrate consistent improvements across all evaluation benchmarks.
examples.zh: 我们的实证结果表明在所有评估基准上都有一致的改进。

examples.en: The empirical findings contradict the theoretical prediction that larger models always generalize better.
examples.zh: 实证发现与更大模型总是泛化更好的理论预测相矛盾。

examples.en: We provide empirical evidence that pre-training data quality matters more than quantity.
examples.zh: 我们提供了预训练数据质量比数量更重要的实证证据。

examples.en: We compare our method against strong baselines including BERT-large and GPT-3.
examples.zh: 我们将我们的方法与包括BERT-large和GPT-3在内的强基线进行比较。

examples.en: A simple TF-IDF baseline already achieves 85% accuracy, setting a high bar for neural methods.
examples.zh: 简单的TF-IDF基线已经达到85%的准确率，为神经方法设定了高标准。

examples.en: Fair comparison requires running all baselines with the same hyperparameter search budget.
examples.zh: 公平比较需要使用相同的超参数搜索预算运行所有基线。

examples.en: Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on four out of five evaluation benchmarks.
examples.zh: 我们的方法在五个评估基准中的四个上取得了最先进的结果。

examples.en: The state-of-the-art in image generation has progressed rapidly with the advent of diffusion models.
examples.zh: 随着扩散模型的出现，图像生成领域的最先进水平快速进步。

examples.en: Claiming state-of-the-art requires careful comparison with concurrent work published in the same period.
examples.zh: 声称达到最先进水平需要与同期发表的并发工作进行仔细比较。

examples.en: We propose a novel attention mechanism that captures both local and global dependencies.
examples.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的注意力机制，可以捕获局部和全局依赖关系。

examples.en: The novel contribution of this work lies in the theoretical analysis rather than the architecture design.
examples.zh: 这项工作的新颖贡献在于理论分析而非架构设计。

examples.en: We introduce a novel training objective that directly optimizes the downstream evaluation metric.
examples.zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的训练目标，直接优化下游评估指标。

examples.en: The proposed model consistently outperforms all baselines by a significant margin.
examples.zh: 所提出的模型以显著的幅度一致地超越了所有基线。

examples.en: Our method outperforms the previous state-of-the-art by 3.2 points on the GLUE benchmark.
examples.zh: 我们的方法在GLUE基准上比之前的最先进水平高出3.2个点。

examples.en: Smaller models with better training recipes can outperform larger models trained naively.
examples.zh: 具有更好训练方案的较小模型可以超越天真训练的较大模型。

examples.en: The model remains robust to adversarial perturbations and out-of-distribution inputs.
examples.zh: 该模型对对抗性扰动和分布外输入保持鲁棒。

examples.en: Adversarial training improves model robustness but may slightly reduce clean accuracy.
examples.zh: 对抗训练提高了模型鲁棒性但可能略微降低干净准确率。

examples.en: Robust optimization ensures the model performs well under the worst-case data distribution shift.
examples.zh: 鲁棒优化确保模型在最坏情况的数据分布偏移下表现良好。

examples.en: The proposed architecture is highly scalable, maintaining linear complexity with respect to sequence length.
examples.zh: 所提出的架构具有高度可扩展性，保持与序列长度相关的线性复杂度。

examples.en: Scalable training infrastructure is essential for pre-training models with hundreds of billions of parameters.
examples.zh: 可扩展的训练基础设施对于预训练具有数千亿参数的模型至关重要。

examples.en: The algorithm scales gracefully to datasets with millions of data points and thousands of features.
examples.zh: 该算法优雅地扩展到具有数百万数据点和数千个特征的数据集。

examples.en: We derive a tractable lower bound on the log-likelihood for efficient variational inference.
examples.zh: 我们推导出对数似然的可处理下界以进行高效的变分推断。

examples.en: Making the exact computation tractable requires approximations such as mean-field factorization.
examples.zh: 使精确计算变得可处理需要诸如平均场分解之类的近似。

examples.en: The linear attention variant makes the attention computation tractable for very long sequences.
examples.zh: 线性注意力变体使注意力计算对于非常长的序列变得可处理。

examples.en: Exact inference in this model is intractable, necessitating approximate variational methods.
examples.zh: 这个模型中的精确推断是不可处理的，需要近似变分方法。

examples.en: The partition function is intractable to compute exactly for models with complex dependency structures.
examples.zh: 对于具有复杂依赖结构的模型，配分函数的精确计算是不可处理的。

examples.en: The intractable posterior distribution is approximated by a simpler family of distributions.
examples.zh: 不可处理的后验分布由更简单的分布族来近似。

examples.en: We replace hand-crafted heuristic rules with a learned neural scoring function.
examples.zh: 我们用学习到的神经评分函数替换手工设计的启发式规则。

examples.en: The heuristic approach provides a reasonable solution but lacks theoretical optimality guarantees.
examples.zh: 启发式方法提供了合理的解决方案但缺乏理论最优性保证。

examples.en: Temperature annealing is a common heuristic for balancing exploration and exploitation during training.
examples.zh: 温度退火是在训练期间平衡探索和利用的常见启发式方法。

examples.en: Monte Carlo approximation estimates the intractable posterior distribution through random sampling.
examples.zh: 蒙特卡洛近似通过随机采样来估计不可处理的后验分布。

examples.en: The Taylor approximation of the loss surface reveals the local curvature around the optimum.
examples.zh: 损失面的泰勒近似揭示了最优值附近的局部曲率。

examples.en: Low-rank approximation reduces computational cost while retaining most of the information in the original matrix.
examples.zh: 低秩近似在保留原始矩阵中大部分信息的同时降低了计算成本。

examples.en: The algorithm has asymptotic time complexity of O(n log n) in the average case.
examples.zh: 该算法在平均情况下具有O(n log n)的渐近时间复杂度。

examples.en: Asymptotic analysis may not reflect practical performance for the moderate-sized inputs seen in practice.
examples.zh: 渐近分析可能无法反映实践中遇到的中等大小输入的实际性能。

examples.en: The estimator is asymptotically consistent but may require very large samples to converge.
examples.zh: 该估计器是渐近一致的但可能需要非常大的样本才能收敛。

examples.en: We pretrain on a diverse corpus comprising web text, books, and scientific articles.
examples.zh: 我们在包含网页文本、书籍和科学文章的多样化语料库上预训练。

examples.en: The training corpus contains 1.5 trillion tokens collected from publicly available internet data.
examples.zh: 训练语料库包含从公开可用的互联网数据中收集的1.5万亿个标记。

examples.en: Data deduplication of the training corpus removes near-duplicate documents to improve training efficiency.
examples.zh: 训练语料库的数据去重移除近重复文档以提高训练效率。

examples.en: Three expert annotators provide annotation for each example with an inter-annotator agreement of 0.85.
examples.zh: 三位专家标注者为每个示例提供标注，标注者间一致性为0.85。

examples.en: Crowdsourced annotation is cost-effective but may introduce noise that requires quality control filtering.
examples.zh: 众包标注具有成本效益但可能引入需要质量控制过滤的噪声。

examples.en: The annotation guidelines define clear criteria for edge cases to improve consistency across annotators.
examples.zh: 标注指南为边界情况定义了明确的标准以提高标注者之间的一致性。

examples.en: The pretrain-finetune paradigm has become the dominant approach in modern NLP.
examples.zh: 预训练-微调范式已成为现代NLP中的主导方法。

examples.en: Foundation models represent a paradigm shift from task-specific models to general-purpose systems.
examples.zh: 基础模型代表了从特定任务模型到通用系统的范式转变。

examples.en: The prompting paradigm replaces task-specific heads with natural language instructions.
examples.zh: 提示范式用自然语言指令替换特定任务的头部。

examples.en: The end-to-end pipeline replaces the traditional multi-stage approach with a single differentiable model.
examples.zh: 端到端流水线用单一可微模型替换了传统的多阶段方法。

examples.en: Each stage in the pipeline introduces potential error propagation to downstream components.
examples.zh: 流水线中的每个阶段都会引入对下游组件的潜在错误传播。

examples.en: The ML pipeline automates data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation.
examples.zh: ML流水线自动化了数据预处理、特征工程、模型训练和评估。

examples.en: End-to-end training jointly optimizes all components, avoiding error propagation between stages.
examples.zh: 端到端训练联合优化所有组件，避免各阶段之间的错误传播。

examples.en: The end-to-end approach eliminates the need for handcrafted intermediate representations.
examples.zh: 端到端方法消除了对手工制作的中间表示的需求。

examples.en: End-to-end differentiable systems can be trained entirely with gradient-based optimization.
examples.zh: 端到端可微系统可以完全使用基于梯度的优化来训练。

examples.en: The pretrained model is evaluated on a suite of downstream tasks including sentiment and NER.
examples.zh: 预训练模型在包括情感分析和命名实体识别在内的一系列下游任务上进行评估。

examples.en: Downstream performance strongly correlates with pretraining data quality and diversity.
examples.zh: 下游性能与预训练数据质量和多样性强相关。

examples.en: Task-specific fine-tuning adapts the general representations to the requirements of each downstream application.
examples.zh: 特定任务微调将通用表示适应每个下游应用的要求。

examples.en: Improvements in the upstream pretraining stage propagate to all downstream applications.
examples.zh: 上游预训练阶段的改进传播到所有下游应用。

examples.en: Upstream data quality issues, such as label noise, cascade through the entire ML pipeline.
examples.zh: 上游数据质量问题，如标签噪声，级联通过整个ML流水线。

examples.en: The upstream model provides embeddings that serve as input features for multiple downstream tasks.
examples.zh: 上游模型提供嵌入作为多个下游任务的输入特征。

examples.en: The model exploits spurious correlations in the dataset rather than learning genuine causal patterns.
examples.zh: 模型利用数据集中的伪相关性，而不是学习真正的因果模式。

examples.en: Shortcut learning captures spurious features like image backgrounds instead of object semantics.
examples.zh: 捷径学习捕获图像背景等伪特征而非物体语义。

examples.en: Adversarial debiasing methods remove spurious correlations between protected attributes and predictions.
examples.zh: 对抗去偏方法移除受保护属性和预测之间的伪相关性。

examples.en: Small adversarial perturbations to the input can cause the model to produce incorrect predictions.
examples.zh: 对输入的小对抗性扰动可以导致模型产生不正确的预测。

examples.en: Perturbation-based explanation methods measure feature importance by observing output changes.
examples.zh: 基于扰动的解释方法通过观察输出变化来衡量特征重要性。

examples.en: The model should be invariant to semantically meaningless perturbations such as typos and formatting.
examples.zh: 模型应该对语义无意义的扰动如拼写错误和格式保持不变。

examples.en: Mixup training performs interpolation between pairs of training examples and their labels.
examples.zh: Mixup训练在训练样本对及其标签之间进行插值。

examples.en: Smooth interpolation in latent space produces semantically meaningful intermediate representations.
examples.zh: 潜在空间中的平滑插值产生语义上有意义的中间表示。

examples.en: Neural networks can interpolate well within the training distribution but struggle with extrapolation.
examples.zh: 神经网络可以在训练分布内很好地插值但在外推方面有困难。

examples.en: Length extrapolation remains challenging for Transformer models trained on short sequences.
examples.zh: 长度外推对于在短序列上训练的Transformer模型仍然具有挑战性。

examples.en: Models that learn causal mechanisms can extrapolate to novel environments more reliably.
examples.zh: 学习因果机制的模型可以更可靠地外推到新环境。

examples.en: Scaling law extrapolation predicts that a 10x larger model would achieve a 2-point improvement.
examples.zh: 缩放定律外推预测10倍大的模型将实现2个点的改进。

examples.en: Feature aggregation combines information from multiple scales to produce a unified representation.
examples.zh: 特征聚合结合来自多个尺度的信息以产生统一的表示。

examples.en: Mean aggregation of neighbor features is a simple but effective strategy in graph neural networks.
examples.zh: 邻居特征的均值聚合是图神经网络中一种简单但有效的策略。

examples.en: Attention-weighted aggregation allows the model to focus on the most informative features.
examples.zh: 注意力加权聚合允许模型关注最具信息量的特征。

examples.en: The model learns to disentangle content and style representations for controllable generation.
examples.zh: 模型学习解耦内容和风格表示以实现可控生成。

examples.en: Disentangled representations isolate independent factors of variation in the data.
examples.zh: 解耦表示隔离数据中独立的变化因素。

examples.en: Beta-VAE promotes disentanglement by increasing the weight on the KL divergence term.
examples.zh: Beta-VAE通过增加KL散度项的权重来促进解耦。

examples.en: Contrastive learning pulls positive pairs closer while pushing negative pairs apart in the embedding space.
examples.zh: 对比学习在嵌入空间中将正样本对拉近，同时将负样本对推远。

examples.en: SimCLR uses contrastive loss with augmented views of the same image as positive pairs.
examples.zh: SimCLR使用对比损失，将同一图像的增强视图作为正样本对。

examples.en: The contrastive objective encourages the model to learn discriminative features without explicit labels.
examples.zh: 对比目标鼓励模型在没有显式标签的情况下学习判别性特征。

examples.en: Self-supervised pretraining creates supervision signals from the structure of the unlabeled data itself.
examples.zh: 自监督预训练从未标记数据本身的结构中创建监督信号。

examples.en: Masked image modeling is a self-supervised objective that reconstructs randomly masked image patches.
examples.zh: 掩码图像建模是一种重建随机掩码图像补丁的自监督目标。

examples.en: Self-supervised methods have closed the gap with supervised pretraining on many vision benchmarks.
examples.zh: 自监督方法在许多视觉基准上缩小了与监督预训练的差距。

examples.en: Curriculum learning trains the model on easy examples first, gradually increasing difficulty.
examples.zh: 课程学习首先在简单样本上训练模型，逐渐增加难度。

examples.en: Anti-curriculum learning starts with harder examples, which can be beneficial for some tasks.
examples.zh: 反课程学习从更难的示例开始，这对某些任务可能是有益的。

examples.en: Self-paced learning is a form of curriculum learning where the model selects its own training order.
examples.zh: 自步学习是一种课程学习形式，其中模型选择自己的训练顺序。

examples.en: Multimodal models jointly process text, images, and audio within a unified architecture.
examples.zh: 多模态模型在统一架构中联合处理文本、图像和音频。

examples.en: Multimodal pretraining on image-text pairs enables zero-shot visual recognition through natural language.
examples.zh: 在图像-文本对上的多模态预训练通过自然语言实现零样本视觉识别。

examples.en: Late fusion combines independently processed modality representations at the decision level.
examples.zh: 晚期融合在决策层面结合独立处理的模态表示。

examples.en: Cross-modal attention enables the model to align visual regions with corresponding text tokens.
examples.zh: 跨模态注意力使模型能够将视觉区域与相应的文本标记对齐。

examples.en: Cross-modal retrieval allows searching images using text queries and vice versa.
examples.zh: 跨模态检索允许使用文本查询搜索图像，反之亦然。

examples.en: Contrastive learning aligns cross-modal representations by maximizing agreement between paired modalities.
examples.zh: 对比学习通过最大化配对模态之间的一致性来对齐跨模态表示。

examples.en: We augment the training set with synthetic data generated by a stronger teacher model.
examples.zh: 我们用更强的教师模型生成的合成数据来增强训练集。

examples.en: Synthetic data generation enables training on scenarios that are rare or dangerous to collect in reality.
examples.zh: 合成数据生成使在现实中罕见或危险的场景上进行训练成为可能。

examples.en: Model collapse can occur when successive generations of models are trained on their own synthetic outputs.
examples.zh: 当连续几代模型在自己的合成输出上训练时，可能会发生模型崩溃。

examples.en: Data leakage occurs when information from the test set inadvertently influences model training.
examples.zh: 数据泄露发生在测试集的信息无意中影响模型训练时。

examples.en: Temporal data leakage happens when future information is used to predict past events.
examples.zh: 时间数据泄露发生在使用未来信息来预测过去事件时。

examples.en: Careful feature engineering is needed to prevent target leakage through highly correlated proxy variables.
examples.zh: 需要仔细的特征工程来防止通过高度相关的代理变量导致的目标泄露。

examples.en: The optimized kernel achieves 2x higher throughput measured in tokens per second per GPU.
examples.zh: 优化后的内核在每GPU每秒标记数衡量下实现了2倍更高的吞吐量。

examples.en: Continuous batching improves serving throughput by dynamically adding new requests to active batches.
examples.zh: 连续批处理通过动态将新请求添加到活跃批次来提高服务吞吐量。

examples.en: The throughput-latency tradeoff is a key consideration in deploying LLMs for production applications.
examples.zh: 吞吐量-延迟权衡是将LLM部署到生产应用时的关键考虑因素。

examples.en: End-to-end latency must remain below 100ms to meet the real-time serving requirements.
examples.zh: 端到端延迟必须保持在100毫秒以下以满足实时服务要求。

examples.en: Model distillation reduces inference latency by replacing large models with smaller, faster alternatives.
examples.zh: 模型蒸馏通过用更小、更快的替代品替换大型模型来降低推理延迟。

examples.en: P99 latency captures the worst-case delay experienced by the 99th percentile of requests.
examples.zh: P99延迟捕获第99百分位请求所经历的最坏情况延迟。

examples.en: Overparameterized models can achieve zero training loss while still generalizing well, contradicting classical theory.
examples.zh: 过参数化模型可以实现零训练损失同时仍然泛化良好，这与经典理论相矛盾。

examples.en: The implicit regularization of SGD in overparameterized networks biases solutions toward simpler functions.
examples.zh: SGD在过参数化网络中的隐式正则化将解偏向更简单的函数。

examples.en: Understanding why overparameterized models generalize is one of the key open questions in deep learning theory.
examples.zh: 理解过参数化模型为什么能泛化是深度学习理论中的关键开放问题之一。

examples.en: The double descent phenomenon shows that test error can decrease again after the interpolation threshold.
examples.zh: 双重下降现象表明测试误差在插值阈值之后可以再次降低。

examples.en: Epoch-wise double descent occurs when training longer initially increases then decreases test error.
examples.zh: 当更长的训练最初增加然后降低测试误差时，会发生按轮次的双重下降。

examples.en: The double descent curve challenges the classical U-shaped bias-variance tradeoff picture.
examples.zh: 双重下降曲线挑战了经典的U型偏差-方差权衡图景。

examples.en: We identify the Pareto optimal tradeoff between model accuracy and inference latency.
examples.zh: 我们识别模型准确性和推理延迟之间的帕累托最优权衡。

examples.en: The Pareto frontier shows the set of models where improving one metric requires sacrificing another.
examples.zh: 帕累托前沿显示了改善一个指标需要牺牲另一个指标的模型集合。

examples.en: Multi-objective optimization searches for solutions on the Pareto frontier of competing objectives.
examples.zh: 多目标优化在竞争目标的帕累托前沿上搜索解决方案。

examples.en: The proliferation of large language models has raised concerns about computational costs and carbon footprint.
examples.zh: 大语言模型的激增引发了对计算成本和碳足迹的担忧。

examples.en: The proliferation of benchmark datasets makes comprehensive evaluation increasingly expensive.
examples.zh: 基准数据集的激增使得全面评估变得越来越昂贵。

examples.en: Model proliferation in production systems creates significant operational complexity for MLOps teams.
examples.zh: 生产系统中模型的激增为MLOps团队创建了显著的运营复杂性。

examples.en: We leverage pretrained representations to bootstrap learning on low-resource downstream tasks.
examples.zh: 我们利用预训练表示来引导低资源下游任务的学习。

examples.en: The framework leverages chain-of-thought reasoning to decompose complex questions into simpler sub-questions.
examples.zh: 该框架利用思维链推理将复杂问题分解为更简单的子问题。

examples.en: We leverage the compositionality of natural language to create synthetic training examples.
examples.zh: 我们利用自然语言的组合性来创建合成训练示例。

examples.en: Data augmentation is employed to mitigate the risk of overfitting on small training sets.
examples.zh: 采用数据增强来缓解在小型训练集上过拟合的风险。

examples.en: Gradient checkpointing mitigates memory constraints by recomputing activations during the backward pass.
examples.zh: 梯度检查点通过在反向传播期间重新计算激活来缓解内存约束。

examples.en: Debiasing techniques mitigate the harmful effects of societal biases encoded in training data.
examples.zh: 去偏技术缓解了训练数据中编码的社会偏见的有害影响。

chinese: 消融（移除某组件进行实验）

examples.en: We ablate the attention module to measure its contribution to overall performance.
examples.zh: 我们消融注意力模块以衡量其对整体性能的贡献。

examples.en: When we ablate the data augmentation component, performance drops by 3.5 percentage points.
examples.zh: 当我们消融数据增强组件时，性能下降了3.5个百分点。

examples.en: We systematically ablate each loss term to understand its individual effect on training.
examples.zh: 我们系统地消融每个损失项以理解其对训练的单独影响。

examples.en: We propose a novel algorithm that achieves faster convergence on non-convex optimization problems.
examples.zh: 我们提出一种新算法，在非凸优化问题上能实现更快的收敛。

examples.en: The algorithm's scalability is validated through extensive experiments on various hardware accelerators.
examples.zh: 该算法的可扩展性通过在多种硬件加速器上的实验得到验证。

examples.en: Our algorithm incorporates attention mechanisms to capture long-range dependencies in sequential data effectively.
examples.zh: 我们的算法融合注意力机制，以有效捕捉序列数据中的长程依赖。

examples.en: We removed all instances with ambiguous labels from the training dataset to improve model performance.
examples.zh: 我们从训练数据集中移除了所有标签模糊的样本以提高模型性能。

examples.en: Annotators were instructed to label each text sample with one or more sentiment categories.
examples.zh: 标注人员被指示用一个或多个情感类别对每个文本样本进行标注。

examples.en: The model cannot perform multi-label classification when training samples lack multiple ground-truth labels.
examples.zh: 当训练样本缺少多个真实标签时，模型无法执行多标签分类任务。

examples.en: To train the model, we manually annotate 10,000 images with bounding boxes.
examples.zh: 为了训练模型，我们手动标注了1万张图像的边界框。

examples.en: We used crowdsourcing to annotate medical documents, achieving 95% inter-annotator agreement.
examples.zh: 我们使用众包方式标注医学文档，达到95%的标注者一致性。

examples.en: The pre-trained model can automatically annotate new documents with entity types and relations.
examples.zh: 预训练模型可以自动标注新文档中的实体类型和关系。

examples.en: Effective feature engineering remains essential for achieving competitive results on benchmark datasets.
examples.zh: 有效的特征工程对于在基准数据集上获得竞争性结果仍然至关重要。

examples.en: Features learned from deep convolutional networks can effectively capture hierarchical visual structures.
examples.zh: 深度卷积网络学到的特征可以有效捕捉分层视觉结构。

examples.en: Sparse features are typically handled using regularization techniques like L1 and L2.
examples.zh: 稀疏特征通常使用L1和L2等正则化技术处理。

examples.en: Each attribute in the dataset was normalized to zero mean and unit variance.
examples.zh: 数据集中的每个属性都被归一化为零均值和单位方差。

examples.en: The model learns to weight each attribute based on its predictive importance.
examples.zh: 模型学会根据属性的预测重要性对其进行加权。

examples.en: Missing attribute values were imputed using K-nearest neighbors interpolation.
examples.zh: 缺失的属性值使用K近邻插补法进行填充。

examples.en: The model reduces the dimension of features through principal component analysis.
examples.zh: 模型通过主成分分析降低特征维度。

examples.en: Higher embedding dimensions can capture more semantic information but require more memory.
examples.zh: 更高的嵌入维度可以捕获更多语义信息，但需要更多内存。

examples.en: The curse of dimensionality becomes a significant challenge when feature dimension exceeds sample size.
examples.zh: 当特征维度超过样本数量时，维数诅咒成为一个重大挑战。

examples.en: The training dataset exhibits significant imbalance, with minority classes underrepresented across samples.
examples.zh: 训练数据集显示显著的不平衡，少数类在样本中代表不足。

examples.en: Addressing class imbalance through techniques like SMOTE improves minority class recall in imbalanced datasets.
examples.zh: 通过SMOTE等技术处理类别不平衡改进了不平衡数据集中少数类的召回率。

examples.en: Model performance degradation often stems from feature imbalance and requires standardization across input dimensions.
examples.zh: 模型性能下降通常源于特征不平衡，需要在输入维度上进行标准化。

examples.en: Effective preprocessing involves removing outliers and handling missing values in raw data.
examples.zh: 有效的预处理包括在原始数据中移除异常值和处理缺失值。

examples.en: The model's accuracy improved significantly after careful preprocessing and feature normalization.
examples.zh: 在仔细的预处理和特征归一化之后，模型的准确度显著提高。

examples.en: In NLP tasks, preprocessing including tokenization and stemming significantly improves model performance.
examples.zh: 在NLP任务中，包括分词和词干提取的预处理显著提高了模型性能。

examples.en: The model achieved robust performance by employing robust loss functions that are less sensitive to outliers.
examples.zh: 该模型通过采用对离群值不敏感的鲁棒损失函数，实现了稳健的性能。

examples.en: Removing statistical outliers from training data can significantly improve neural network generalization.
examples.zh: 从训练数据中移除统计离群值可以显著改进神经网络的泛化性能。

examples.en: We evaluated model robustness against distribution shift and identified outliers in the test set.
examples.zh: 我们评估了模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，并识别了测试集中的离群值。

examples.en: The model flags any anomaly in sensor data as a potential equipment failure.
examples.zh: 模型将传感器数据中的任何异常标记为潜在的设备故障。

examples.en: Detecting temporal anomalies helps identify sudden changes in network traffic patterns.
examples.zh: 检测时间序列异常有助于识别网络流量模式的突变。

examples.en: The presence of anomalies in training data can significantly degrade model performance.
examples.zh: 训练数据中异常的存在会严重降低模型性能。

examples.en: During training, the model parameters are updated using gradient descent optimization.
examples.zh: 在训练过程中，模型参数通过梯度下降优化算法进行更新。

examples.en: Proper parameter initialization is crucial for fast convergence in deep neural networks.
examples.zh: 合适的参数初始化对深度神经网络的快速收敛至关重要。

examples.en: Regularization techniques help prevent overfitting by constraining parameter magnitudes.
examples.zh: 正则化技术通过约束参数幅度来帮助防止过拟合。

examples.en: Proper weight initialization is crucial for training deep neural networks efficiently.
examples.zh: 恰当的权重初始化对于有效训练深层神经网络至关重要。

examples.en: The optimizer adjusts the weights based on the gradient computed from the loss function.
examples.zh: 优化器根据损失函数计算的梯度调整权重。

examples.en: Weight decay is a regularization technique that prevents the model from overfitting.
examples.zh: 权重衰减是一种正则化技术，能防止模型过拟合。

examples.en: Adam optimization typically outperforms standard SGD in convergence speed when training modern deep neural networks.
examples.zh: 在训练现代深度神经网络时，Adam优化通常在收敛速度上优于标准SGD。

examples.en: Hyperparameter optimization using Bayesian search significantly improves model performance on validation datasets.
examples.zh: 使用贝叶斯搜索的超参数优化显著提高了模型在验证集上的性能。

examples.en: Network optimization through quantization and pruning reduces model size while maintaining competitive accuracy.
examples.zh: 通过量化和剪枝的网络优化可以减少模型大小，同时保持竞争力的精度。

examples.en: The learning rate is the most critical hyperparameter when configuring any optimizer.
examples.zh: 学习率是配置任何优化器时最关键的超参数。

examples.en: SGD with momentum optimizer often converges faster than vanilla gradient descent in practice.
examples.zh: 带动量的SGD优化器在实践中通常比标准梯度下降收敛速度更快。

examples.en: Modern optimizers like AdamW incorporate weight decay regularization directly into the optimization step.
examples.zh: AdamW等现代优化器直接在优化步骤中集成了权重衰减正则化。

examples.en: The loss function converges exponentially after fifty epochs of training.
examples.zh: 损失函数在50个训练周期后呈指数收敛。

examples.en: Despite different initialization methods, all models converge to similar performance metrics.
examples.zh: 尽管初始化方法不同，所有模型都收敛到相似的性能指标。

examples.en: Stochastic gradient descent may fail to converge when learning rate is excessively high.
examples.zh: 当学习率过高时，随机梯度下降可能无法收敛。

examples.en: The loss function rapidly diverges when gradient descent uses excessively large step sizes.
examples.zh: 当梯度下降使用过大的步长时，损失函数迅速发散。

examples.en: Different initialization strategies cause the trained models to diverge in their learned representations.
examples.zh: 不同的初始化策略导致训练后的模型在其学习的表示上发生偏离。

examples.en: The generator and discriminator losses diverge when training stability is compromised during adversarial learning.
examples.zh: 当对抗学习中训练稳定性受到破坏时，生成器和判别器的损失会发散。

examples.en: We employ cross-entropy loss for multi-class classification tasks in our neural network.
examples.zh: 我们在神经网络中对多类分类任务采用交叉熵损失函数。

examples.en: The gradient of the loss function guides the backpropagation algorithm during model training.
examples.zh: 损失函数的梯度在模型训练期间指导反向传播算法。

examples.en: Monitoring the validation loss helps prevent overfitting and improves model generalization.
examples.zh: 监控验证损失有助于防止过拟合并改进模型的泛化能力。

examples.en: The objective function measures the difference between predicted and ground truth labels during training.
examples.zh: 目标函数在训练过程中衡量预测值与真实标签之间的差异。

examples.en: Our model optimizes a weighted objective across multiple tasks to improve generalization performance.
examples.zh: 我们的模型通过对多个任务的加权目标函数进行优化来提高泛化性能。

examples.en: The minimax objective captures the adversarial game between generator and discriminator networks.
examples.zh: 极小极大目标函数捕捉了生成器和判别器网络之间的对抗博弈。

examples.en: The convergence criterion is satisfied when the gradient norm falls below a predefined threshold.
examples.zh: 当梯度范数低于预定义阈值时，收敛准则得到满足。

examples.en: Different model evaluation criteria are employed depending on whether the task is classification or regression.
examples.zh: 根据任务是分类还是回归，采用不同的模型评估准则。

examples.en: The stopping criterion for training is activated when validation loss plateaus for consecutive epochs.
examples.zh: 当验证损失在连续周期内停滞时，训练停止准则被激活。

examples.en: After each iteration of the backpropagation algorithm, model parameters are updated to minimize loss.
examples.zh: 在反向传播算法的每次迭代之后，模型参数都会被更新以最小化损失函数。

examples.en: The research went through multiple iterations before achieving state-of-the-art performance on ImageNet.
examples.zh: 该研究经过多次迭代才最终在ImageNet上达到最先进的性能。

examples.en: Convergence is typically observed within a few thousand iterations when training with adaptive optimizers.
examples.zh: 使用自适应优化器训练时，通常在几千次迭代内就能观察到收敛。

examples.en: We apply batch normalization after each convolutional layer to stabilize training.
examples.zh: 我们在每个卷积层之后应用批量归一化以稳定训练。

examples.en: We train the neural network on batches of 128 samples to balance memory and gradient quality.
examples.zh: 我们使用包含128个样本的批次来训练神经网络，以平衡内存和梯度质量。

examples.en: During inference, we process input data in batches to maximize GPU utilization.
examples.zh: 在推理过程中，我们以批次处理输入数据以最大化GPU利用率。

examples.en: Mini-batch gradient descent is widely used in training deep neural networks for its computational efficiency.
examples.zh: 小批次梯度下降因其计算效率在深度神经网络训练中被广泛使用。

examples.en: We employ mini-batches to balance the trade-off between convergence speed and computational cost.
examples.zh: 我们采用小批次来平衡收敛速度和计算成本之间的权衡。

examples.en: The mini-batch size significantly affects both training dynamics and the final model performance.
examples.zh: 小批次大小显著影响训练动态和最终模型的性能。

examples.en: We resumed training from the latest checkpoint to prevent computational waste.
examples.zh: 我们从最新检查点恢复训练，以避免计算资源的浪费。

examples.en: The best checkpoint achieved 95.2% accuracy on the validation set during training.
examples.zh: 最佳检查点在训练期间在验证集上达到了95.2%的准确率。

examples.en: Distributed training requires synchronizing checkpoints across multiple GPU nodes periodically.
examples.zh: 分布式训练需要定期在多个GPU节点之间同步检查点。

examples.en: We adopt a cosine learning rate schedule with linear warmup to ensure stable training convergence.
examples.zh: 我们采用带线性预热的余弦学习率调度以确保训练稳定收敛。

examples.en: The model training follows a curriculum learning schedule, progressively introducing harder examples over time.
examples.zh: 模型训练遵循课程学习调度，随着时间推移逐步引入更难的样本。

examples.en: An optimal job schedule on distributed systems minimizes idle time and improves overall GPU utilization rates.
examples.zh: 分布式系统上的最优作业调度最小化空闲时间并提高整体GPU利用率。

examples.en: Applying gradient clipping with a threshold of 5.0 prevents exploding gradients in RNNs.
examples.zh: 应用阈值为5.0的梯度裁剪可防止RNN中的梯度爆炸。

examples.en: By clipping gradients to a maximum norm, we stabilize training of deep neural networks.
examples.zh: 通过将梯度裁剪到最大范数，我们稳定了深度神经网络的训练。

examples.en: In Transformer models, gradient clipping ensures stable convergence across many layers.
examples.zh: 在Transformer模型中，梯度裁剪确保在多层之间稳定收敛。

examples.en: The vanishing gradient problem severely restricts the training of very deep neural networks.
examples.zh: 梯度消失问题严重限制了深层神经网络的训练。

examples.en: Skip connections successfully mitigate vanishing gradients in residual networks like ResNet architectures.
examples.zh: 跳跃连接成功缓解了残差网络（如ResNet架构）中的梯度消失。

examples.en: We identified vanishing activation patterns that prevent information propagation through deeper network layers.
examples.zh: 我们识别出了阻止信息通过更深网络层传播的消失激活模式。

examples.en: Exploding gradients can destabilize the training of deep neural networks without proper gradient clipping.
examples.zh: 未使用适当的梯度裁剪，爆炸梯度会破坏深层神经网络的训练。

examples.en: We observed exploding activation values after several training iterations without regularization.
examples.zh: 在没有正则化的多次训练迭代后，我们观察到激活值爆炸。

examples.en: The LSTM network exhibited exploding loss when learning rates were not properly tuned.
examples.zh: 当学习率调整不当时，LSTM网络会出现损失爆炸。

examples.en: Models trained on ImageNet often fail to generalize to real-world distributions.
examples.zh: 在ImageNet上训练的模型通常难以泛化到真实数据分布。

examples.en: Our theoretical analysis shows the algorithm can generalize with high probability.
examples.zh: 我们的理论分析表明该算法能以高概率进行泛化。

examples.en: Regularization techniques help the network generalize better from limited training data.
examples.zh: 正则化技术帮助网络从有限的训练数据中更好地泛化。

examples.en: We normalize inputs to have zero mean and unit variance during the preprocessing stage.
examples.zh: 我们在预处理阶段对输入进行归一化，使其具有零均值和单位方差。

examples.en: The model normalizes batch statistics to reduce internal covariate shift during training.
examples.zh: 该模型对批统计量进行归一化以减少训练期间的内部协变量转移。

examples.en: Unlike batch norm, layer normalization normalizes activations across features not batch dimension.
examples.zh: 与批量归一化不同，层归一化在特征维度而非批次维度上对激活值进行归一化。

examples.en: Improving model robustness against adversarial examples is crucial for deploying deep neural networks in safety-critical applications.
examples.zh: 提高模型对对抗样本的鲁棒性对于在安全关键应用中部署深度神经网络至关重要。

examples.en: Adversarial training enhances robustness by exposing the model to worst-case perturbations during optimization.
examples.zh: 对抗训练通过在优化过程中暴露模型到最坏情况扰动来增强鲁棒性。

examples.en: We evaluated the robustness of our model across different datasets and found significant performance degradation on out-of-distribution samples.
examples.zh: 我们评估了模型在不同数据集上的鲁棒性，发现在分布外样本上性能显著下降。

examples.en: Learning disentangled representations is crucial for improving both model interpretability and generalization.
examples.zh: 学习解纠缠的表示对于提高模型的可解释性和泛化能力至关重要。

examples.en: Vision transformers learn spatially-aware representations that capture both local and global features.
examples.zh: 视觉Transformer学习空间感知的表示，捕捉局部和全局特征。

examples.en: Contrastive learning forces the model to create meaningful representations by pushing similar samples closer together.
examples.zh: 对比学习通过拉近相似样本的距离，强制模型创建有意义的表示。

examples.en: The model's neural architecture employs multiple convolutional and pooling layers for feature extraction.
examples.zh: 该模型的神经网络架构采用多个卷积层和池化层进行特征提取。

examples.en: Neural processing mechanisms in biological systems have inspired modern artificial intelligence design.
examples.zh: 生物系统中的神经处理机制启发了现代人工智能的设计。

examples.en: The study reveals how neural plasticity enables networks to adapt during fine-tuning procedures.
examples.zh: 该研究揭示了神经可塑性如何使网络在微调过程中适应变化。

examples.en: The Transformer architecture introduces self-attention mechanisms for efficiently processing sequential data in natural language.
examples.zh: Transformer架构引入自注意力机制，用于高效处理自然语言的序列数据。

examples.en: Different architectural choices between CNNs and RNNs significantly impact model performance and computational efficiency.
examples.zh: CNN和RNN之间的不同架构选择显著影响模型性能和计算效率。

examples.en: The ResNet architecture employs residual connections to facilitate training of deeper neural networks more effectively.
examples.zh: ResNet架构采用残差连接，更有效地促进深度神经网络的训练。

examples.en: The output layer produces probability scores for each class in the classification task.
examples.zh: 输出层为分类任务中的每个类别生成概率分数。

examples.en: Each convolutional layer applies learnable filters to extract spatial features from input feature maps.
examples.zh: 每个卷积层使用可学习的滤波器从输入特征图中提取空间特征。

examples.en: Stacking multiple layers together enables deep networks to learn complex non-linear function representations.
examples.zh: 将多个层堆叠在一起使深度网络能够学习复杂的非线性函数表示。

examples.en: The self-attention module captures long-range dependencies by computing weighted interactions between all positions in the sequence.
examples.zh: 自注意力模块通过计算序列中所有位置之间的加权交互来捕捉长程依赖关系。

examples.en: Stacking multiple transformer modules allows the network to learn hierarchical representations of input data.
examples.zh: 堆叠多个变换器模块使网络能够学习输入数据的分层表示。

examples.en: This module can be seamlessly integrated into any encoder architecture without modifying the existing components.
examples.zh: 该模块可以无缝集成到任何编码器架构中，无需修改现有组件。

examples.en: The sigmoid activation function squashes input values between zero and one for binary classification tasks.
examples.zh: Sigmoid激活函数将输入值压缩到0到1之间，用于二分类任务。

examples.en: Without non-linear activation functions, deep neural networks would collapse to a single linear transformation.
examples.zh: 没有非线性激活函数，深度神经网络会退化为单个线性变换。

examples.en: Modern architectures often employ the GELU activation to improve performance on language modeling tasks.
examples.zh: 现代架构通常采用GELU激活函数来改进语言建模任务的性能。

examples.en: The introduction of nonlinearity is crucial for overcoming the limitations of linear models in representation.
examples.zh: 引入非线性对于克服线性模型在表示方面的局限性至关重要。

examples.en: ReLU and other nonlinearity activation functions have become standard in modern deep neural networks.
examples.zh: ReLU和其他非线性激活函数已成为现代深度神经网络的标准。

examples.en: Without sufficient nonlinearity in the architecture, the model cannot capture the intricate patterns in high-dimensional data.
examples.zh: 如果架构中没有足够的非线性，模型就无法捕捉高维数据中的复杂模式。

examples.en: Convolutional neural networks have revolutionized computer vision by learning hierarchical feature representations automatically.
examples.zh: 卷积神经网络通过自动学习分层特征表示，彻底改变了计算机视觉领域。

examples.en: The convolutional layer extracts spatial features through weight sharing and local connectivity mechanisms.
examples.zh: 卷积层通过权重共享和局部连接机制来提取空间特征。

examples.en: Modern object detection systems rely on convolutional backbones for efficient feature extraction from high-resolution images.
examples.zh: 现代目标检测系统依靠卷积骨干网络从高分辨率图像中高效提取特征。

examples.en: The attention mechanism weights each element based on its relevance to the query.
examples.zh: 注意力机制根据每个元素与查询的相关性进行加权。

examples.en: Multi-head attention allows the model to attend to different representation subspaces simultaneously.
examples.zh: 多头注意力允许模型同时关注不同的表示子空间。

examples.en: Transformer relies on stacked attention layers to capture contextual relationships across the entire sequence.
examples.zh: Transformer依靠堆叠的注意力层来捕捉整个序列中的上下文关系。

examples.en: We stack convolutional layers with residual connections to improve gradient flow during training.
examples.zh: 我们堆叠具有残差连接的卷积层以改善训练期间的梯度流。

examples.en: The encoder stacks attention outputs from multiple heads to capture diverse semantic information.
examples.zh: 编码器堆叠来自多个注意力头的输出以捕获多样化的语义信息。

examples.en: We stack predictions from different classifiers to create an ensemble model with improved robustness.
examples.zh: 我们堆叠来自不同分类器的预测以创建具有更好鲁棒性的集成模型。

examples.en: The variational inference method approximates complex posterior distributions through tractable surrogates.
examples.zh: 变分推断方法通过易处理的替代分布来近似复杂的后验分布。

examples.en: We maximize the variational lower bound to learn meaningful representations in deep generative models.
examples.zh: 我们最大化变分下界以在深度生成模型中学习有意义的表征。

examples.en: The variational gap between the true posterior and its approximation determines model accuracy.
examples.zh: 真实后验与其近似之间的变分间隙决定了模型的准确性。

examples.en: Shannon entropy quantifies the average information content or uncertainty in a probability distribution.
examples.zh: 香农熵衡量概率分布中的平均信息含量或不确定性。

examples.en: Information gain uses entropy reduction to select the best splitting features in decision tree learning.
examples.zh: 信息增益通过熵的减少来选择决策树中的最佳分裂特征。

examples.en: Maximum entropy models assign uniform probability distributions to states that satisfy observed constraints.
examples.zh: 最大熵模型对满足观察约束的状态分配均匀概率分布。

examples.en: The cross-entropy loss function is widely used in classification tasks to measure the distance between predicted and ground-truth distributions.
examples.zh: 交叉熵损失函数在分类任务中广泛使用，用于衡量预测分布与真实分布之间的距离。

examples.en: We employ cross-entropy as the objective function to optimize the neural network parameters during training.
examples.zh: 我们采用交叉熵作为目标函数来优化神经网络在训练过程中的参数。

examples.en: Binary cross-entropy is specifically designed for binary classification problems with sigmoid activation.
examples.zh: 二元交叉熵专门为使用sigmoid激活函数的二分类问题设计。

examples.en: The BERT model achieves 95.1% accuracy on the SQuAD benchmark, establishing a new state-of-the-art result.
examples.zh: BERT模型在SQuAD基准上达到95.1%的准确率，创造了新的最先进结果。

examples.en: Improving accuracy on imbalanced datasets requires careful tuning of loss function weights and sampling strategies.
examples.zh: 提高不平衡数据集上的准确率需要仔细调整损失函数权重和采样策略。

examples.en: The trade-off between accuracy and inference speed is critical for deploying deep learning models in production.
examples.zh: 准确率与推断速度之间的权衡对于在生产环境中部署深度学习模型至关重要。

examples.en: The model's performance is evaluated using the F1 metric on the test dataset.
examples.zh: 该模型的性能通过测试数据集上的F1指标来评估。

examples.en: We minimize the loss metric during training to improve model convergence and generalization.
examples.zh: 我们在训练期间最小化损失度量以改进模型的收敛性和泛化能力。

examples.en: Different evaluation metrics provide complementary perspectives on model quality and robustness.
examples.zh: 不同的评估指标提供了模型质量和鲁棒性的互补视角。

examples.en: The model's performance evaluation on the test dataset achieved a 95% accuracy rate.
examples.zh: 该模型在测试数据集上的性能评估达到了95%的准确率。

examples.en: Comprehensive evaluation of downstream tasks demonstrates the pre-trained model's generalization capability.
examples.zh: 对下游任务的全面评估证明了预训练模型的泛化能力。

examples.en: Recent studies emphasize the importance of human evaluation in assessing language generation quality.
examples.zh: 最近的研究强调了人工评估在评价语言生成质量中的重要性。

examples.en: In our experiments, we observed that the model learns to match the target data distribution through adversarial training.
examples.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们发现模型通过对抗训练学会匹配目标数据分布。

examples.en: We model the uncertainty in predictions using a probabilistic distribution over the output space.
examples.zh: 我们使用输出空间上的概率分布来建模预测的不确定性。

examples.en: The variational autoencoder learns the underlying distribution by minimizing the Kullback-Leibler divergence.
examples.zh: 变分自编码器通过最小化KL散度来学习数据的潜在分布。

examples.en: The model computes the probability distribution over all possible classes for each input instance.
examples.zh: 该模型为每个输入实例计算所有可能类别上的概率分布。

examples.en: Variational inference approximates the true posterior probability through a tractable distribution.
examples.zh: 变分推断通过可处理的分布近似真实后验概率。

examples.en: The classification boundary is determined by setting a probability threshold of 0.5 in binary classification.
examples.zh: 在二分类中，通过设置 0.5 的概率阈值来确定分类边界。

examples.en: The likelihood function measures how probable the observed data is under different model parameters.
examples.zh: 似然函数衡量在不同模型参数下观察到数据的概率大小。

examples.en: Given the likelihood and prior distribution, we compute the posterior probability using Bayes' theorem.
examples.zh: 给定似然和先验分布，我们使用贝叶斯定理计算后验概率。

examples.en: Maximum likelihood estimation finds parameter values that make the observed data most likely.
examples.zh: 最大似然估计寻找使观察数据最可能出现的参数值。

examples.en: The posterior distribution reveals how data updates our beliefs about model parameters.
examples.zh: 后验分布显示数据如何更新我们对模型参数的信念。

examples.en: Variational inference provides a computationally efficient approximation to the intractable posterior distribution.
examples.zh: 变分推理提供了对难以处理的后验分布的计算高效近似。

examples.en: We sample from the posterior to generate predictive distributions for new data.
examples.zh: 我们从后验分布中采样来生成对新数据的预测分布。

examples.en: Choosing an informative prior can significantly improve convergence speed in Bayesian neural networks.
examples.zh: 选择信息型先验可以显著改善贝叶斯神经网络的收敛速度。

examples.en: We employ a weakly informative prior to prevent overfitting while maintaining flexibility in parameter estimation.
examples.zh: 我们采用弱信息先验来防止过拟合，同时保持参数估计的灵活性。

examples.en: The posterior distribution is obtained by combining the likelihood with the prior through Bayes' theorem.
examples.zh: 后验分布通过贝叶斯定理将似然函数与先验结合而得到。

examples.en: Modern Bayesian neural networks effectively combine deep learning with principled uncertainty quantification methods.
examples.zh: 现代贝叶斯神经网络有效地结合了深度学习与有原则的不确定性量化方法。

examples.en: Bayesian optimization efficiently explores high-dimensional hyperparameter spaces for machine learning model tuning.
examples.zh: 贝叶斯优化有效地探索高维超参数空间用于机器学习模型调优。

examples.en: The Bayesian approach allows researchers to incorporate prior knowledge and update beliefs with new evidence.
examples.zh: 贝叶斯方法允许研究人员融入先验知识并用新证据更新信念。

examples.en: The deterministic nature of gradient descent ensures reproducibility across different runs.
examples.zh: 梯度下降的确定性特性确保了不同运行间的可重现性。

examples.en: Unlike stochastic methods, deterministic approaches provide consistent results without randomness.
examples.zh: 不同于随机方法，确定性方法无需随机性即可提供一致的结果。

examples.en: We use deterministic weight initialization to ensure fair comparison between different models.
examples.zh: 我们采用确定性权重初始化以确保不同模型间的公平比较。

examples.en: Probabilistic graphical models efficiently represent complex dependencies among variables.
examples.zh: 概率图模型能有效地表示变量之间的复杂依赖关系。

examples.en: Bayesian inference provides a principled probabilistic approach to parameter estimation.
examples.zh: 贝叶斯推理为参数估计提供了一种基于原理的概率方法。

examples.en: Variational autoencoders use probabilistic latent representations for generative modeling.
examples.zh: 变分自编码器使用概率潜在表示进行生成式建模。

examples.en: Importance sampling reduces variance in Monte Carlo estimation by weighting samples appropriately.
examples.zh: 重要性采样通过适当加权样本来减少蒙特卡罗估计中的方差。

examples.en: Random sampling of mini-batches improves generalization in deep neural network training procedures.
examples.zh: 随机采样小批量数据改进了深度神经网络训练的泛化性能。

examples.en: Stratified sampling maintains the original class distribution better than uniform random sampling methods.
examples.zh: 分层采样比均匀随机采样更好地保持原始类别分布。

examples.en: To minimize the divergence between predicted and true distributions, we employ the variational inference method.
examples.zh: 为了最小化预测分布与真实分布之间的散度，我们采用变分推理方法。

examples.en: The generator suffers from mode collapse due to significant divergence in the loss landscape across training iterations.
examples.zh: 由于不同训练迭代中损失景观的散度较大，生成器容易陷入模式崩溃。

examples.en: Wasserstein distance provides more stable training dynamics compared to divergence-based metrics in generative models.
examples.zh: 与基于散度的度量相比，Wasserstein距离在生成模型中提供更稳定的训练动态。

examples.en: Semantic similarity between document embeddings is often computed using cosine or Euclidean distance metrics.
examples.zh: 文档嵌入之间的语义相似度通常使用余弦或欧几里得距离度量计算。

examples.en: The algorithm clusters data points by maximizing similarity within clusters and minimizing similarity between clusters.
examples.zh: 该算法通过最大化簇内相似度和最小化簇间相似度来对数据点进行聚类。

examples.en: A high similarity score indicates that the query embedding and document embedding are semantically aligned.
examples.zh: 高相似度分数表明查询嵌入和文档嵌入在语义上是对齐的。

examples.en: We measure the similarity between users by computing the cosine distance between their preference vectors.
examples.zh: 我们通过计算用户偏好向量之间的余弦距离来衡量用户之间的相似度。

examples.en: The cosine annealing schedule gradually decreases the learning rate following a cosine function.
examples.zh: 余弦退火计划按照余弦函数逐步降低学习率。

examples.en: Pre-trained word embeddings are typically compared using cosine similarity due to its computational efficiency.
examples.zh: 预训练的词向量通常使用余弦相似度进行比较，因为它计算效率高。

examples.en: Transfer learning has dramatically reduced the need for large labeled datasets in target domains.
examples.zh: 迁移学习大幅降低了目标领域对大规模标记数据集的需求。

examples.en: We transfer knowledge from the source model to improve performance on downstream classification tasks.
examples.zh: 我们从源模型迁移知识以改进下游分类任务的性能。

examples.en: The weights learned on ImageNet effectively transfer to medical image analysis without substantial fine-tuning.
examples.zh: 在ImageNet上学到的权重能够有效迁移到医学图像分析，而无需大量微调。

examples.en: The pretrained vision transformer adapts well to downstream tasks with minimal fine-tuning.
examples.zh: 预训练的视觉变换器能够很好地适应下游任务，只需最小化微调。

examples.en: We adapt the hyperparameters dynamically based on validation performance during training.
examples.zh: 我们在训练过程中根据验证性能动态调整超参数。

examples.en: Agents must adapt their policies to environmental changes to maximize long-term cumulative rewards.
examples.zh: 智能体必须根据环境变化调整其策略以最大化长期累积奖励。

examples.en: The model's rapid adaptation to unseen data demonstrates its generalization capability.
examples.zh: 该模型对未见数据的快速适应能力展示了其泛化能力。

examples.en: Adversarial adaptation techniques enable neural networks to handle distribution shifts effectively.
examples.zh: 对抗自适应技术使神经网络能够有效处理分布转移。

examples.en: Fine-tuning represents an efficient adaptation strategy for leveraging pre-trained models on downstream tasks.
examples.zh: 微调是利用预训练模型在下游任务中的高效自适应策略。

examples.en: Model distillation has emerged as a key technique for compressing large neural networks into smaller, deployable variants.
examples.zh: 模型蒸馏已成为将大型神经网络压缩为更小、可部署版本的关键技术。

examples.en: The distillation process involves training a smaller student network to mimic the behavior of a larger teacher model.
examples.zh: 蒸馏过程涉及训练一个较小的学生网络来模仿更大教师模型的行为。

examples.en: Knowledge distillation significantly reduces inference latency while maintaining comparable accuracy on downstream tasks.
examples.zh: 知识蒸馏显著降低推理延迟，同时在下游任务上保持可比的精度。

examples.en: Meta-learning, often called learning to learn, empowers models to acquire new skills efficiently.
examples.zh: 元学习，通常被称为学习如何学习，使模型能够高效地获得新技能。

examples.en: MAML and other meta-learning algorithms achieve strong performance on few-shot classification tasks.
examples.zh: MAML和其他元学习算法在少样本分类任务上取得强大性能。

examples.en: By optimizing the learning process itself, meta-learning reduces the amount of task-specific training data needed.
examples.zh: 通过优化学习过程本身，元学习减少了所需的任务特定训练数据量。

examples.en: Continual learning systems must efficiently handle task sequences without catastrophic forgetting of previously acquired knowledge.
examples.zh: 持续学习系统必须有效处理任务序列，避免灾难性遗忘之前获得的知识。

examples.en: We implemented continual monitoring of model performance metrics across all production clusters.
examples.zh: 我们在所有生产集群中实施了持续的模型性能监测。

examples.en: Continual domain adaptation requires models to learn from streaming data with minimal supervision.
examples.zh: 持续域适应要求模型从流式数据中进行最小监督学习。

examples.en: Continual learning systems suffer from catastrophic forgetting when trained on sequential tasks.
examples.zh: 持续学习系统在按顺序训练多个任务时会遭受灾难性遗忘。

examples.en: The model experienced catastrophic performance degradation immediately after receiving a single bad update.
examples.zh: 单次不良更新后，该模型的性能立即出现了灾难性降低。

examples.en: A catastrophic failure in the encoder network caused irreversible degradation of model capabilities.
examples.zh: 编码器网络中的灾难性故障导致了模型能力的不可逆转的降低。

examples.en: The curriculum strategy significantly improved convergence speed in deep neural network training.
examples.zh: 该课程策略显著加快了深层神经网络训练的收敛速度。

examples.en: Our adaptive curriculum gradually increases task difficulty to enhance model robustness.
examples.zh: 我们的自适应课程逐步增加任务难度以提高模型鲁棒性。

examples.en: The proposed curriculum design proved effective for reinforcement learning agents navigating complex environments.
examples.zh: 所提课程设计在强化学习智能体导航复杂环境中证明有效。

examples.en: Discriminative models learn to separate different classes by directly modeling the decision boundary.
examples.zh: 判别式模型通过直接建模决策边界来学习区分不同类别。

examples.en: The discriminative power of deep neural networks has revolutionized computer vision tasks.
examples.zh: 深度神经网络的判别能力彻底改变了计算机视觉任务。

examples.en: Unlike generative models, discriminative approaches focus on learning p(y|x) rather than the joint distribution.
examples.zh: 与生成式模型不同，判别式方法专注于学习p(y|x)而非联合分布。

examples.en: Researchers used synthetic training data from simulation to pre-train their reinforcement learning agent.
examples.zh: 研究人员使用来自仿真的合成训练数据预训练强化学习智能体。

examples.en: The model generates synthetic ground truth labels for unlabeled samples using confidence thresholding.
examples.zh: 该模型使用置信度阈值为未标注样本生成合成真实标签。

examples.en: Synthetic gradient computation reduces communication overhead in distributed deep learning without affecting convergence speed.
examples.zh: 合成梯度计算减少了分布式深度学习中的通信开销，不影响收敛速度。

examples.en: Adversarial training requires careful tuning of perturbation magnitude and learning rate.
examples.zh: 对抗训练需要精心调整扰动幅度和学习率。

examples.en: The adversarial loss function drives the generator to produce increasingly realistic images.
examples.zh: 对抗损失函数驱动生成器生成越来越逼真的图像。

examples.en: Adversarial robustness remains a critical challenge in deploying deep learning systems.
examples.zh: 对抗鲁棒性仍然是部署深度学习系统的关键挑战。

examples.en: Denoising autoencoders are trained by corrupting inputs and learning to reconstruct the original data.
examples.zh: 去噪自编码器通过破坏输入并学习重构原始数据来训练。

examples.en: The iterative denoising process in diffusion models gradually transforms noise into realistic samples.
examples.zh: 扩散模型中的迭代去噪过程逐步将噪声转换为真实样本。

examples.en: Denoising techniques improve model robustness across computer vision, signal processing, and language tasks.
examples.zh: 去噪技术在计算机视觉、信号处理和语言任务中提高了模型的鲁棒性。

examples.en: The GAN framework synthesizes diverse training samples to augment limited medical imaging datasets.
examples.zh: GAN框架合成多样化的训练样本以增强有限的医学成像数据集。

examples.en: The encoder synthesizes visual and textual features into a unified semantic representation.
examples.zh: 编码器将视觉特征和文本特征合成为统一的语义表示。

examples.en: Knowledge distillation helps the student model synthesize complex patterns learned by the teacher network.
examples.zh: 知识蒸馏帮助学生模型合成教师网络学到的复杂模式。

examples.en: The decoder network in variational autoencoders reconstructs high-resolution images from the learned low-dimensional latent representations.
examples.zh: 变分自编码器中的解码器网络从学习到的低维潜在表征重建高分辨率图像。

examples.en: Diffusion models reconstruct clean data by gradually denoising images through multiple reverse timesteps.
examples.zh: 扩散模型通过多个反向时步逐步去噪来重建干净的数据。

examples.en: The algorithm reconstructs missing regions in corrupted images using contextual information from surrounding pixels.
examples.zh: 该算法利用周围像素的上下文信息重建腐蚀图像中的缺失区域。

examples.en: The federated learning framework enables robust model aggregation across geographically distributed devices.
examples.zh: 联邦学习框架支持在地理位置分散的设备上进行强大的模型聚合。

examples.en: In federated optimization, each participating client computes gradients locally before sending updates.
examples.zh: 在联邦优化中，每个参与的客户端在发送更新之前在本地计算梯度。

examples.en: The federated approach preserves user privacy while achieving competitive model performance across organizations.
examples.zh: 联邦方法在保护用户隐私的同时，实现了跨组织的竞争性模型性能。

examples.en: The model employs a distributed architecture to handle massive data volumes efficiently.
examples.zh: 该模型采用分布式架构来高效处理海量数据。

examples.en: Distributed inference enables real-time predictions across edge devices and cloud servers.
examples.zh: 分布式推理使实时预测能够跨越边缘设备和云服务器进行。

examples.en: We implement a distributed optimization algorithm to minimize communication overhead between nodes.
examples.zh: 我们实现了分布式优化算法以最小化节点间的通信开销。

examples.en: Data parallelism enables efficient training of large deep neural networks across multiple GPUs in distributed environments.
examples.zh: 数据并行能够在分布式环境中高效地跨多个GPU训练大型深度神经网络。

examples.en: Pipeline parallelism reduces memory footprint by distributing transformer layers across multiple compute devices sequentially.
examples.zh: 流水线并行通过将Transformer层依次分配到多个计算设备上来降低内存占用。

examples.en: Modern large language models leverage hybrid parallelism strategies combining tensor, data, and pipeline parallelism techniques.
examples.zh: 现代大语言模型采用混合并行策略，综合运用张量并行、数据并行和流水线并行技术。

examples.en: Asynchronous SGD enables faster training by allowing parameter servers to receive delayed gradient updates.
examples.zh: 异步随机梯度下降使参数服务器能接收延迟的梯度更新，从而加快训练速度。

examples.en: The model uses asynchronous data loading to prevent I/O bottlenecks during distributed training.
examples.zh: 该模型采用异步数据加载来防止分布式训练期间的I/O瓶颈。

examples.en: Asynchronous gradient accumulation allows workers to optimize independently without waiting for synchronization.
examples.zh: 异步梯度累积允许工作节点独立优化，无需等待同步。

examples.en: The model's confidence score determines whether a sample receives a pseudo-label during training.
examples.zh: 模型的置信度分数决定了样本在训练过程中是否被赋予伪标签。

examples.en: Noisy pseudo-labels can accumulate errors and degrade the overall learning performance significantly.
examples.zh: 嘈杂的伪标签会累积错误，显著降低整体学习性能。

examples.en: Semi-supervised learning leverages pseudo-labels to expand the effective training dataset with unlabeled samples.
examples.zh: 半监督学习利用伪标签将无标签样本纳入有效的训练数据集中。

examples.en: Bootstrap resampling methods enable us to construct confidence intervals without parametric assumptions.
examples.zh: 自举重采样方法使我们能够在不基于参数假设的情况下构造置信区间。

examples.en: Bagging algorithms employ bootstrap samples to train multiple weak learners in parallel ensembles.
examples.zh: Bagging算法采用自助采样方法来并行训练多个弱学习器以构建集成模型。

examples.en: Bootstrap aggregating reduces variance and improves generalization in ensemble machine learning models.
examples.zh: 自举聚合方法可以减少方差并提高集成机器学习模型的泛化能力。

examples.en: The input data was split into three subsets: 60% for training, 20% for validation, and 20% for testing.
examples.zh: 输入数据分为三个子集：60%用于训练，20%用于验证，20%用于测试。

examples.en: We used k-fold cross-validation with k=5, creating five different data splits for robust evaluation.
examples.zh: 我们使用k=5的k折交叉验证，创建五个不同的数据划分以进行稳健评估。

examples.en: At each node, the algorithm searches for the split that maximizes information gain.
examples.zh: 在每个节点处，算法搜索能最大化信息增益的分割。

examples.en: Data leakage from training set to test set leads to overly optimistic performance metrics.
examples.zh: 数据泄露将训练集信息混入测试集，导致性能指标虚高。

examples.en: Temporal leakage in time-series forecasting occurs when test features contain information from future periods.
examples.zh: 时间序列预测中的时间泄露指测试特征包含未来期间的信息。

examples.en: Cross-validation leakage emerges when data preprocessing steps are not properly isolated per fold.
examples.zh: 当数据预处理步骤未在各折叠间隔离时，交叉验证会产生泄露。

examples.en: Each word is represented as a continuous vector in the embedding space.
examples.zh: 每个词在嵌入空间中被表示为一个连续向量。

examples.en: The weight vectors in each layer are optimized to minimize the classification error.
examples.zh: 每层的权重向量被优化以最小化分类误差。

examples.en: The cosine similarity between two word vectors indicates their semantic relationship strength.
examples.zh: 两个词向量的余弦相似度表示其语义关系的强度。

examples.en: The gradient tensor is computed through backpropagation across the network layers.
examples.zh: 梯度张量通过网络各层的反向传播计算得出。

examples.en: The convolutional layers produce a feature tensor with shape [batch, channels, height, width].
examples.zh: 卷积层生成形状为 [batch, channels, height, width] 的特征张量。

examples.en: Weight tensor parameters are optimized during training to minimize the loss function.
examples.zh: 权重张量参数在训练期间被优化以最小化损失函数。

examples.en: The convolutional kernel matrix is shared across spatial positions to significantly reduce model parameters.
examples.zh: 卷积核矩阵在空间位置上共享以显著减少模型参数。

examples.en: The similarity matrix between query and key vectors determines attention weights in Transformers.
examples.zh: 查询向量和键向量之间的相似度矩阵决定了Transformer中的注意力权重。

examples.en: Analyzing the Gram matrix of activations reveals the structure of learned features.
examples.zh: 分析激活值的Gram矩阵可以揭示学习特征的结构。

examples.en: Non-negative matrix factorization has emerged as a powerful technique for discovering interpretable features from high-dimensional data.
examples.zh: 非负矩阵分解已成为从高维数据中发现可解释特征的强大技术。

examples.en: Tensor factorization extends the matrix decomposition approach to handle multi-dimensional data structures efficiently.
examples.zh: 张量分解将矩阵分解方法扩展到高效处理多维数据结构。

examples.en: The factorization framework enables scalable optimization by reducing problem space dimensionality in deep learning models.
examples.zh: 分解框架通过降低深度学习模型中问题空间的维度实现可扩展的优化。

examples.en: The eigenvalues of the covariance matrix correspond to the variance explained by each principal component.
examples.zh: 协方差矩阵的特征值对应于每个主成分解释的方差。

examples.en: Computing the smallest eigenvalue of the Laplacian matrix helps identify graph connectivity properties.
examples.zh: 计算拉普拉斯矩阵的最小特征值有助于识别图的连通性性质。

examples.en: The eigenvalues of the Hessian matrix reveal the local curvature information during neural network optimization.
examples.zh: Hessian矩阵的特征值在神经网络优化中揭示了局部曲率信息。

examples.en: Non-convex optimization in neural networks makes convergence guarantees difficult to establish.
examples.zh: 神经网络中的非凸优化使得收敛保证难以确立。

examples.en: Stochastic gradient descent surprisingly finds good solutions in non-convex loss landscapes efficiently.
examples.zh: 随机梯度下降在非凸损失函数空间中能惊人地有效地找到好的解。

examples.en: The non-convex nature of deep learning creates numerous saddle points that optimization algorithms must navigate.
examples.zh: 深度学习的非凸性质产生了众多鞍点，优化算法必须对其进行导航。

examples.en: Analyzing the loss landscape reveals why neural networks generalize well despite non-convexity.
examples.zh: 分析损失地形揭示了神经网络尽管非凸仍能很好泛化的原因。

examples.en: Understanding the optimization landscape helps design more efficient and robust training algorithms.
examples.zh: 理解优化地形有助于设计更高效和更稳健的训练算法。

examples.en: The geometry of the optimization landscape influences both convergence rate and generalization performance.
examples.zh: 优化地形的几何形状影响收敛速度和泛化性能。
